meta.name: RPA Responses to Positive Affect Scale
meta.description: The RPA is a 17-item self-report measure that assesses how individuals typically respond when they experience positive emotions. It captures three response styles: Dampening (diminishing positive feelings), Self-focused positive rumination (focusing on oneself), and Emotion-focused positive rumination (focusing on the emotional experience). The scale is useful for understanding individual differences in savoring or dampening positive emotions.
meta.author: Feldman, Joormann & Johnson (2008)
meta.reference: Feldman GC, Joormann J, Johnson SL. Responses to positive affect: A self-report measure of rumination and dampening. Cogn Ther Res. 2008;32(4):507-525.
meta.instruction: Think about times when you feel happy or are in a good mood. Please indicate what you generally do when you feel happy or are in a good mood.

questions.text: Think about things that have not gone well for you.
Think "This is too good to be true."
Think about things that could go wrong.
Think "I don't deserve to feel this good."
Remind yourself these feelings won't last.
Think about ways in which things could go better.
Think about how happy you feel.
Think about how strong you feel.
Think about how proud you are of yourself.
Think about how lucky you are.
Think about the good things that have happened to you.
Feel like you can do everything.
Notice how you feel full of energy.

ranges.label: Low Overall Response
ranges.description: Your overall response to positive affect is low across all domains. You may not strongly engage with positive emotions in any particular way. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Review your subscale scores for a more meaningful interpretation
Consider whether you tend to notice and engage with positive emotions
Practice paying attention to pleasant experiences as they occur
Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences

ranges.label: Moderate Overall Response
ranges.description: You show a moderate overall level of response to positive emotions. Check subscale scores to see your balance of dampening versus savoring. At this level, psychological concerns may be affecting your daily life. It is recommended to take active steps and consider available support options.
suggestions: Focus on the subscale breakdown for personalized insights
If dampening is high relative to positive rumination, practice savoring exercises
Cultivate awareness of how you respond when feeling good
Consider consulting a mental health professional
Identify your specific sources of concern

ranges.label: High Overall Response
ranges.description: You show a high level of engagement with positive emotions. Check subscale scores to determine whether this reflects healthy savoring or excessive dampening.
suggestions: Review subscale scores carefully to understand your response pattern
If dampening is elevated, work on allowing yourself to fully enjoy positive moments
If positive rumination is high, continue nurturing this adaptive response style
Schedule a mental health professional assessment as soon as possible
Make sure you have trusted people around you for support

dampening.label: Low Dampening
dampening.description: You rarely dampen your positive emotions. You tend to allow yourself to fully experience and enjoy positive feelings. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities
Remember to seek support when facing difficulties

dampening.label: Moderate Dampening
dampening.description: You sometimes dampen your positive emotions by thinking about negatives or discounting good feelings. At this level, psychological concerns may be affecting your daily life. It is recommended to take active steps and consider available support options.
suggestions: Consider consulting a mental health professional
Identify your specific sources of concern
Maintain a structured daily routine
Try relaxation and coping methods that suit you
Engage in meaningful activities and social interactions

dampening.label: High Dampening
dampening.description: You frequently dampen positive emotions. This tendency may reduce your ability to benefit from positive experiences. Your mental health concerns are notable and may be impacting daily functioning. Speaking with a mental health professional is recommended.
suggestions: Schedule a mental health professional assessment as soon as possible
Make sure you have trusted people around you for support
Follow the treatment plan recommended by your professional
Maintain basic daily self-care routines
If you feel overwhelmed, call a mental health helpline for immediate support

dampening.label: Very High Dampening
dampening.description: You very often dampen your positive emotions. This pattern is associated with vulnerability to depression and reduced well-being. Your mental health concerns are notable and may be impacting daily functioning. Speaking with a mental health professional is recommended.
suggestions: Schedule a mental health professional assessment as soon as possible
Make sure you have trusted people around you for support
Follow the treatment plan recommended by your professional
Maintain basic daily self-care routines
If you feel overwhelmed, call a mental health helpline for immediate support

self_focused.label: Low
self_focused.description: You rarely focus on yourself (e.g., pride, strength, achievement) when feeling positive. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities
Remember to seek support when facing difficulties

self_focused.label: Moderate
self_focused.description: You sometimes reflect on your personal strengths and accomplishments during positive moments. At this level, psychological concerns may be affecting your daily life. It is recommended to take active steps and consider available support options.
suggestions: Consider consulting a mental health professional
Identify your specific sources of concern
Maintain a structured daily routine
Try relaxation and coping methods that suit you
Engage in meaningful activities and social interactions

self_focused.label: High
self_focused.description: You often focus on personal pride and achievement when experiencing positive emotions. Your mental health concerns are notable and may be impacting daily functioning. Speaking with a mental health professional is recommended.
suggestions: Schedule a mental health professional assessment as soon as possible
Make sure you have trusted people around you for support
Follow the treatment plan recommended by your professional
Maintain basic daily self-care routines
If you feel overwhelmed, call a mental health helpline for immediate support

self_focused.label: Very High
self_focused.description: You very frequently engage in self-focused positive rumination, strongly connecting positive feelings to personal worth. Your mental health concerns are notable and may be impacting daily functioning. Speaking with a mental health professional is recommended.
suggestions: Schedule a mental health professional assessment as soon as possible
Make sure you have trusted people around you for support
Follow the treatment plan recommended by your professional
Maintain basic daily self-care routines
If you feel overwhelmed, call a mental health helpline for immediate support

emotion_focused.label: Low
emotion_focused.description: You rarely savor or focus on the positive emotional experience itself. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities
Remember to seek support when facing difficulties

emotion_focused.label: Moderate
emotion_focused.description: You sometimes savor the moment and focus on your positive emotional experiences. At this level, psychological concerns may be affecting your daily life. It is recommended to take active steps and consider available support options.
suggestions: Consider consulting a mental health professional
Identify your specific sources of concern
Maintain a structured daily routine
Try relaxation and coping methods that suit you
Engage in meaningful activities and social interactions

emotion_focused.label: High
emotion_focused.description: You often savor positive moments and actively engage with your positive emotional experiences. Your mental health concerns are notable and may be impacting daily functioning. Speaking with a mental health professional is recommended.
suggestions: Schedule a mental health professional assessment as soon as possible
Make sure you have trusted people around you for support
Follow the treatment plan recommended by your professional
Maintain basic daily self-care routines
If you feel overwhelmed, call a mental health helpline for immediate support

emotion_focused.label: Very High
emotion_focused.description: You very frequently savor and immerse yourself in positive emotional experiences. This is an adaptive response style. Your mental health concerns are notable and may be impacting daily functioning. Speaking with a mental health professional is recommended.
suggestions: Schedule a mental health professional assessment as soon as possible
Make sure you have trusted people around you for support
Follow the treatment plan recommended by your professional
Maintain basic daily self-care routines
If you feel overwhelmed, call a mental health helpline for immediate support
